description.value: You can tap into your biotech's generative nature to don a new face or persona and better adapt to your surroundings. You physically modify your features to another creature of the same size category as yourself. Using Bionanite Skin counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Impersonate] use of Deception, and you gain a +2 status bonus to checks to Impersonate to pretend you're this other creature. You remain in this shape indefinitely and can shift into another shape by using this action again.
